---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for fcm
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Use Case

Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the workflow you want to improve. Why is this important to you?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this feature should work. Include example commands or configuration if applicable.

```bash
# Example usage
fcm <proposed-command> --flag value
```

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? What are their tradeoffs?

## Additional Context

Any other information, screenshots, or references that help explain the request.
